comment: Curated entry/arrival-form reference for Coed-Travels. The sweep prompt feeds the matching countries' data to the AI as GROUND TRUTH so it does not have to web-search (and get wrong) the arrival-form URL/deadline. The AI computes the trip-specific triggerDate itself. Hosted like coed-lists.json; merge/update on GitHub, no app reinstall. arrivalForm=null means the country has no digital pre-arrival card.
disclaimer: Entry rules, visas, and arrival forms change. This is guidance, not legal advice — always verify on the official government site before travel. Visa rules below assume common Western passports (US/UK/EU/CA/AU) unless noted; other nationalities vary.

arrivalForm.name: Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC)
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Submit online within 72 hours (3 days) before arrival. Free. Required for all foreign nationals arriving by air, land, or sea.
arrivalForm.summary: Mandatory online arrival card; generates a QR code shown at immigration.

Thailand.visaNote: Visa-free 60 days for US/UK/EU/AU/CA passports (extendable). e-Visa or embassy visa for nationalities not on the exemption list.

Vietnam.passportValidity: 6 months beyond entry with blank pages

arrivalForm.name: Vietnam Digital Pre-Arrival Declaration
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Recommended before departure; submit up to a few days prior. Mandatory at major airports (e.g. SGN/Tan Son Nhat) since 15 Apr 2026. Separate from the e-Visa.
arrivalForm.summary: Online pre-arrival declaration generating a QR code; does NOT replace the visa.

Vietnam.visaNote: Most passports need an e-Visa (apply at evisa.gov.vn, ~$25 single / $50 multiple, 3+ business days). Consider multiple-entry if exiting and re-entering. Some ASEAN nationals (e.g. Philippines) are visa-free up to 21-30 days.

Cambodia.passportValidity: 6 months beyond entry with one blank page

arrivalForm.name: Cambodia e-Arrival Card (CeA)
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: For AIR arrivals only: submit within 7 days before arrival. LAND/border crossings still use a paper form at the checkpoint — the digital CeA is not required there.
arrivalForm.summary: Unified digital arrival/customs/health card for air arrivals; QR code at immigration.

Cambodia.visaNote: Most passports need a tourist visa: e-Visa at evisa.gov.kh (~$36) or visa on arrival. ASEAN nationals (e.g. Philippines) visa-exempt up to 30 days.

arrivalForm.name: Malaysia Digital Arrival Card (MDAC)
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Submit online within 3 days before arrival. Free. Exemptions include Singapore nationals and some others.
arrivalForm.summary: Mandatory online arrival card for most foreign visitors.

Malaysia.visaNote: Visa-free up to 90 days for US/UK/EU/AU/CA and many; up to 30 days for several others. eNTRI/eVisa for nationalities that require it.

arrivalForm.name: SG Arrival Card (SGAC)
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Submit within 3 days before arrival (including arrival day). Free. Includes an electronic health declaration.
arrivalForm.summary: Mandatory electronic arrival card for all foreign visitors.

Singapore.visaNote: Visa-free 30-90 days for most Western passports. e-Visa for nationalities that require one.

arrivalForm.name: Customs Declaration (e-CD / All Indonesia)
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Electronic customs declaration within 3 days before arrival; QR shown at customs. (Health forms generally no longer required.)
arrivalForm.summary: Digital customs declaration; many travelers also use the 'All Indonesia' app.

Indonesia.visaNote: Most passports need Visa on Arrival or e-VOA (apply at molina.imigrasi.go.id, ~$35, 30 days, extendable once). Some ASEAN nationals visa-free.

arrivalForm.name: eTravel (Philippine Travel Registration)
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Register within 72 hours before EACH flight — both departure and arrival. Free — ignore paid look-alike sites.
arrivalForm.summary: Free mandatory registration generating a QR code for departing and arriving passengers.

Philippines.visaNote: Visa-free up to 30 days for US/UK/EU/AU/CA and many. Filipino citizens enter their own country freely.

Laos.visaNote: Most passports: e-Visa at immigration.gov.la or visa on arrival (~$30-45). Some ASEAN nationals visa-free.

Myanmar.visaNote: e-Visa required for most passports (evisa.moip.gov.mm). Check current travel advisories.

Japan.passportValidity: Valid for duration of stay (6 months recommended)

arrivalForm.name: Visit Japan Web
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Register up to ~2 weeks ahead; generate your QR code at least 6 hours before landing. Optional but speeds up immigration + customs.
arrivalForm.summary: Online immigration + customs declaration producing QR codes for fast-track kiosk lanes. Not a visa.

Japan.visaNote: Visa-free short stay up to 90 days for US/UK/EU/AU/CA. Visa required for nationalities not on the exemption list (e.g. Philippines).

arrivalForm.name: K-ETA (Korea Electronic Travel Authorization)
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Apply at least 72 hours before departure (~$8) IF required. 22 countries incl. US/UK/JP/AU/CA are K-ETA-EXEMPT through 31 Dec 2026 — they may skip it, but holding a K-ETA waives the paper arrival card.
arrivalForm.summary: Pre-travel authorization; currently waived for many nationalities through end of 2026.

South Korea.visaNote: Visa-free 90 days for US/UK/EU/AU/CA. K-ETA exemption for 22 countries extended to Dec 2026. Others need K-ETA or a visa.

China.passportValidity: 6 months beyond entry with blank pages
China.visaNote: Most Western passports need a visa in advance. Visa-free transit (up to 240 hours/10 days) available at many ports for eligible nationalities; some short visa-free stays apply — verify current policy at the nearest embassy.

Hong Kong.passportValidity: 1-6 months beyond stay depending on nationality
Hong Kong.visaNote: Visa-free 90 days (US/UK/EU/AU/CA) or 180 days (UK). Entry is fully electronic — no paper arrival card.

Taiwan.passportValidity: Valid for duration of stay (6 months recommended)

arrivalForm.name: Taiwan Arrival Card (online)
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Optional online arrival card you can submit before arrival to skip the paper form. Free.

Taiwan.visaNote: Visa-free 90 days for US/UK/EU/AU/CA. e-Visa or visa for others.

India.passportValidity: 6 months beyond entry with 2 blank pages
India.visaNote: Most passports need an e-Visa in advance: apply at indianvisaonline.gov.in at least 4 days before arrival. Use the official site only.

Sri Lanka.visaNote: Electronic Travel Authorization (ETA) required for most: official site eta.gov.lk. Apply before travel.

Nepal.visaNote: Visa on arrival for most passports (fill the online form at nepaliport.immigration.gov.np beforehand to speed it up); fees by duration (15/30/90 days).

Australia.visaNote: ALL visitors need a visa/authorization in advance. US/UK/EU: ETA (subclass 601) via the official 'Australian ETA' app (~AUD 20 service fee). Many others: eVisitor (free) or a visitor visa. There is also a paper Incoming Passenger Card given on the plane.

arrivalForm.name: NZeTA + New Zealand Traveller Declaration (NZTD)
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Request the NZeTA before travel (can take up to 72h; ~NZD 17 + IVL levy). Complete the NZ Traveller Declaration within 24 hours before departure.
arrivalForm.summary: NZeTA = pre-travel authorization; NZTD = digital arrival/customs/biosecurity declaration.

New Zealand.visaNote: Visa-waiver countries (US/UK/EU/CA) need an NZeTA, not a visa, for stays up to 90 days. Others need a visitor visa.

United States.passportValidity: Valid for duration of stay (6 months recommended; some countries exempt)

arrivalForm.name: ESTA (Visa Waiver Program)
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: VWP travelers apply for ESTA at least 72 hours before travel (~$21, valid 2 years). Not an arrival card — there is no paper arrival form for air arrivals.
arrivalForm.summary: Pre-travel authorization for the 40+ Visa Waiver Program countries.

United States.visaNote: VWP countries (UK/EU/AU/JP/KR and more): ESTA, up to 90 days. Most other nationalities need a B-1/B-2 visa obtained in advance.

Canada.visaNote: Visa-exempt air travelers (UK/EU/AU/JP and more) need an eTA before boarding (apply at canada.ca, ~CAD 7, minutes to approve). US citizens need neither visa nor eTA. Many other nationalities need a visitor visa. (US-citizen land arrivals: no eTA.)

arrivalForm.name: FMM / Multiple Migratory Form
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: For air arrivals the tourist entry is usually handled at immigration / via the airline; a digital FMM applies at some land borders. Keep the stamped entry permit until departure.
arrivalForm.summary: Tourist entry permit (FMM); process varies by port.

Mexico.visaNote: Visa-free up to 180 days for US/UK/EU/CA/AU and many. Others may need a visa unless they hold a valid US/Canada/Schengen/UK/Japan visa.

Brazil.visaNote: US, Canadian and Australian citizens need an e-Visa (reintroduced 2025) via the official VFS/government portal before travel. UK/EU visa-free up to 90 days.

Costa Rica.passportValidity: 1 day beyond stay for many (6 months recommended)

arrivalForm.name: Digital Migration Form
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Complete the online migration form within 72 hours before arrival and departure. Free.
arrivalForm.summary: Digital entry/exit form generating a QR code.

Costa Rica.visaNote: Visa-free up to 90 days for US/UK/EU/CA/AU. Onward/return ticket often required.

Argentina.visaNote: Visa-free up to 90 days for US/UK/EU/CA/AU.

arrivalForm.name: UK ETA (Electronic Travel Authorisation)
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Required since 25 Feb 2026 for ALL visa-exempt visitors (US/EU/AU/CA and 85+ nationalities), including children. Apply via the 'UK ETA' app (~£20, usually approved in minutes, valid 2 years). British/Irish citizens exempt.
arrivalForm.summary: Pre-travel digital permission; carriers verify it before boarding.

United Kingdom.visaNote: Visa-exempt visitors need an ETA (not a visa) for stays up to 6 months. Visa nationals need a Standard Visitor visa.

France.visaNote: Schengen: visa-free 90 days in any 180 for US/UK/EU/CA/AU/JP. ETIAS authorization launches late 2026 and becomes mandatory in 2027 — NOT yet required for 2026 trips. The biometric Entry/Exit System (EES) is rolling out at borders.

Italy.visaNote: Schengen: visa-free 90/180 days for US/UK/EU/CA/AU/JP. ETIAS not required in 2026 (mandatory ~2027). EES biometric checks rolling out.

Spain.visaNote: Schengen: visa-free 90/180 days for US/UK/EU/CA/AU/JP. ETIAS not required in 2026 (mandatory ~2027). EES biometric checks rolling out.

Germany.visaNote: Schengen: visa-free 90/180 days for US/UK/EU/CA/AU/JP. ETIAS not required in 2026 (mandatory ~2027). EES biometric checks rolling out.

Greece.visaNote: Schengen: visa-free 90/180 days for US/UK/EU/CA/AU/JP. ETIAS not required in 2026 (mandatory ~2027). EES biometric checks rolling out.

Netherlands.visaNote: Schengen: visa-free 90/180 days for US/UK/EU/CA/AU/JP. ETIAS not required in 2026 (mandatory ~2027). EES biometric checks rolling out.

Portugal.visaNote: Schengen: visa-free 90/180 days for US/UK/EU/CA/AU/JP. ETIAS not required in 2026 (mandatory ~2027). EES biometric checks rolling out.

Switzerland.visaNote: Schengen member: visa-free 90/180 days for US/UK/EU/CA/AU/JP. ETIAS not required in 2026 (mandatory ~2027).

United Arab Emirates.visaNote: Visa on arrival for US/UK/EU/AU/CA (30-90 days depending on nationality). Many others need an e-Visa arranged via airline or sponsor. No paper arrival card.

Turkey.visaNote: Visa-free up to 90 days for US/UK/EU/CA. Some nationalities need an e-Visa from the official site evisa.gov.tr (use official site only).

Saudi Arabia.visaNote: Tourist e-Visa for US/UK/EU/AU/CA and ~60 countries at visa.visitsaudi.com (or visa on arrival). One-year multiple-entry, 90-day stays.

Qatar.visaNote: Visa-free entry (visa waiver on arrival) for US/UK/EU/CA/AU and ~95 nationalities, 30-90 days. Hayya platform used for some events/stays.

Jordan.visaNote: Visa on arrival for most Western passports, or e-Visa. The Jordan Pass (jordanpass.jo) waives the visa fee and includes Petra — buy before arrival.

Egypt.visaNote: Visa required: e-Visa at visa2egypt.gov.eg (~$25) or visa on arrival for many Western passports. Use the official site only.

Morocco.visaNote: Visa-free up to 90 days for US/UK/EU/CA/AU. A paper arrival/embarkation card is completed on entry.

South Africa.passportValidity: 30 days beyond departure with 2 blank pages
South Africa.visaNote: Visa-free up to 90 days for US/UK/EU/CA/AU. Others may need a visa or the new ETA (rolling out).

arrivalForm.name: Kenya Electronic Travel Authorisation (eTA)
arrivalForm.deadlineNote: Required for ALL visitors (replaced visas in 2024), including previously visa-free nationals. Apply at least 3 days before travel (~$30+). Use the official site only.
arrivalForm.summary: Mandatory pre-travel authorization for everyone entering Kenya.

Kenya.visaNote: Everyone needs an eTA — there is no longer a visa-free category for tourists.

Tanzania.visaNote: e-Visa at visa.immigration.go.tz or visa on arrival for most (~$50; US citizens ~$100 multiple-entry). Apply via the official site.
